cards.front: DataFrame is a 2-dimensional labeled data structure with columns of potentially different types
cards.back: It is a data structure that contains tabular data with rows and columns

cards.front: The index of a DataFrame is a labeled array that can be used to access rows and columns
cards.back: It can be used to select rows, filter data, and group data

cards.front: The merge function is used to combine two DataFrames based on a common column
cards.back: It can be used to perform inner, left, right, and outer joins

cards.front: The apply function is used to apply a function along an axis of a DataFrame
cards.back: It can be used to perform various operations such as mean, median, and standard deviation

cards.front: The concat function is used to concatenate two DataFrames
cards.back: It can be used to combine DataFrames horizontally or vertically
